name: Alec 24x24 Garage Shed Plan - A Two-Bay Garage with Classic Gable Roof
open_features: 24x24 Garage Shed with Classic Gable Roof
Spacious, symmetrical layout ideal for parking two vehicles, storing equipment, or setting up a full workshop zone.
Straightforward framing, clean roof geometry, and easy-to-follow plans make this garage accessible to new builders and seasoned pros.
Wide double garage doors with divided-light windows offer excellent access, ventilation, and timeless curb appeal.
Horizontal lap siding, crisp white trim, and traditional lantern lighting create a cohesive and inviting garage design.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Alec Garage Shed Plan - a 24x24 multi-purpose garage and workspace solution designed for strength, storage capacity, and clean architectural style. With its traditional gable roof, carriage-style double garage doors, and crisp exterior detailing, the Alec blends timeless American design with modern practicality. Whether you're building a vehicle garage, workshop, equipment hub, or all-in-one utility structure, the Alec 24x24 offers generous square...
